name: soporti
description: AI-powered code assistant that helps support and engineering teams understand and navigate code repositories.
author: Reveni

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client && prettier --check "server/**/*.{js,jsx}" "client/**/*.{js,jsx}"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix server && npm run test:coverage --prefix client
